title: SharedLife
description: SharedLife links players health bars together for an ultimate cooperative challenge. This plugin features strict synchronization: damage taken by one player is immediately reflected on everyone else.
body:
**SharedLife** links players health bars together for an ultimate cooperative challenge. This plugin features strict synchronization: **damage taken by one player is immediately reflected on everyone else.**

## ✨ Key Features

❤️ Strict Health Sync: Instant 1:1 health mirroring.

💛 Absorption Support: Eating a Golden Apple or Notch Apple applies the Absorption effect and yellow hearts to the ENTIRE group.

🍖 Hardcore Regen Rule: Natural regeneration only activates if EVERY group member has a full food bar. If one player is hungry, nobody heals!

💀 Shared Death: If one player dies, everyone dies.

🔗 Easy Linking: Simple commands to link and unlink players.

## 🛠️ Commands

/sharedlife on - Enable the plugin.

/sharedlife off - Disable the plugin.

/sharedlife link <player> - Create a group and link to a player.

/sharedlife unlink - Leave or disband your group.

## 📥 Installation

1.  Download the `.jar` file.
2.  Open your Server `plugins` folder.
3.  Place the file into the `plugins` folder.
4.  Restart your server.
5.  **Enjoy!**
